# rsyslog Windows Agent documentation

> Canonical documentation for rsyslog Windows Agent 26.07.

## Event ID reference

- Human-readable index: https://www.rsyslog.com/download/files/windows-agent-manual/rsyslogwaspecific/event-id-reference/index.html
- Machine-readable Event ID catalog: https://www.rsyslog.com/download/files/windows-agent-manual/event-ids.json
- Documentation sitemap: https://www.rsyslog.com/download/files/windows-agent-manual/sitemap.xml

The Event ID reference covers product-generated Windows Application Event Log
diagnostics. It excludes events collected from other providers and user-selected
IDs emitted by the Write to Windows Event Log action.
